design_philosophy: Clean, clinical authority combined with approachability. Uses a premium clinical blue and white palette. Removes all unnecessary gradients and soft shadows in favor of crisp, 1px borders and optical clarity.

buttons.primary: bg-[#2563EB] text-white hover:bg-[#1D4ED8] hover:text-white transition-colors px-6 py-2.5 rounded-md font-medium
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#0F2C59] border border-[#0F2C59]/20 hover:bg-[#F4F7F9] transition-colors px-6 py-2.5 rounded-md font-medium

inputs.default: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-md px-4 py-2 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#2563EB]/20 focus:border-[#2563EB] transition-all

stats_cards.structure: flex flex-col gap-2 p-6 bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-lg
stats_cards.label: text-sm font-medium text-slate-500
stats_cards.trend_up: text-xs font-medium text-emerald-600 bg-emerald-50 px-2 py-1 rounded-full w-fit
stats_cards.trend_down: text-xs font-medium text-rose-600 bg-rose-50 px-2 py-1 rounded-full w-fit

hero_background.description: Campus aerial view - Use with a heavy deep blue overlay (bg-[#0F2C59]/80) for the login/landing page background.

clinical_training.description: Nursing students conducting a medical procedure. Perfect for the Admissions or Landing page feature section.

student_patient_interaction.description: Healthcare professionals conducting a blood pressure check. Use for Academic Management or Course details visual.

auth_illustration_or_avatar.description: Portrait of a nurse/doctor. Can be used for Faculty profile placeholders or ID card examples.

accessibility_and_testing.data_testid_rule: ALL interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text meets APCA/WCAG AA standards, particularly white text on the primary blue background.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly avoid the Inter font. Use Work Sans for headings and IBM Plex Sans for body text.
Do NOT use any purple colors or gradients.
Implement a responsive sidebar layout for the dashboard. The sidebar should have a dark background (#0F2C59) with white text for high contrast and authority.
Use standard Shadcn components but override their default rounded/shadow styles to match the 'cards' specs in this JSON (sharp, 1px borders, minimal shadows).
Build a role-based navigation structure in the sidebar that visibly adapts if the user is Admin, Faculty, Student, etc.
Use the 'Control Room' grid layout for the Admin dashboard to display dense statistics, charts, and data efficiently.
Use Recharts for the analytics (enrollment trends, fee collection, attendance). Style the charts using the 'brand' and 'functional' colors provided.
